entry.title: OpenClaw Meetup: AI Agent Engineering and Security Insights
entry.content:
OpenClaw Community Meetup Notes

I attended an OpenClaw offline meetup yesterday and learned a lot about the project’s latest progress, practical deployment experience, and LLM security risks. Here are the highlights.

1. OpenClaw Customization: Identity, Soul, and Scheduled Tasks

OpenClaw offers highly flexible customization for AI agents. You can define:

  • Identity for role and persona consistency
  • Soul for style and behavioral tone
  • Scheduled tasks for proactive execution

This allows agents to move beyond simple request-response patterns and become long-running assistants with stable personality and behavior.

Reference:

  • OpenClaw Meetup 2 Slides
  • OpenClaw Meetup Slides

2. Agora’s Voice Interaction Integration

A conventional voice AI pipeline usually goes through three steps:

  1. ASR (speech to text)
  2. LLM (text to text)
  3. TTS (text to speech)

Agora presented a more integrated approach by encapsulating most interaction interfaces and using OpenClaw APIs under the hood. This significantly reduces engineering overhead and improves end-user conversation flow.

3. Deployment Security: Default Settings Are Not Safe

One key warning from the meetup: default deployment settings are often unsafe. Automated bots can scan exposed services quickly, and serious incidents may happen within minutes, such as:

  • Unauthorized database access
  • Sensitive data leakage
  • Host compromise

Recommended hardening actions:

  1. Use SSH key authentication
  2. Configure firewall policies strictly
  3. Keep system and dependencies updated
  4. Enable Fail2ban to block brute-force attempts
  5. Isolate workloads with Docker

Reference:

  • ClawMacdo Deployment Security Toolkit

4. OWASP LLM Top 10 and Prompt Injection

OWASP’s LLM Top 10 risks discussed at the meetup:

  1. Prompt Injection
  2. Sensitive Information Disclosure
  3. Supply Chain Vulnerabilities
  4. Data and Model Poisoning
  5. Improper Output Handling
  6. Excessive Agency
  7. System Prompt Leakage
  8. Vector and Embedding Weaknesses
  9. Misinformation
  10. Unbounded Consumption

The highest-priority risk is Prompt Injection. Even when a model is instructed not to reveal secrets, attackers may still extract data through indirect and incremental prompts.

To reduce this risk, guardrail tools can provide policy checks, threat filters, and sensitive-output protection.

Reference:

  • SafeFence OpenClaw Guardrails

Summary

This meetup made one thing clear: capability growth and security discipline must go together in AI agent systems.

  • OpenClaw enables strong customization and extensibility
  • Integrated voice stacks can improve product experience significantly
  • Security hardening is mandatory, not optional
  • Prompt injection defense should be treated as a first-class requirement

“Security is not a feature, it is a continuous practice.”

OpenClaw 线下见面会记录

昨天参加了 OpenClaw 的线下见面会，收获很大。现场讨论了项目近期进展、工程落地方式，以及大模型安全风险。以下是我整理的核心内容。

1. OpenClaw 的定制能力：Identity、Soul 与定时任务

OpenClaw 提供了很强的智能体定制能力，可以定义：

  • Identity（身份）：保证角色一致性
  • Soul（风格）：塑造表达方式与行为倾向
  • 定时任务：让智能体具备主动执行能力

这意味着智能体不再只是被动问答工具，而是可以长期运行、具备稳定人格和行为逻辑的助手。

参考资料：

  • OpenClaw Meetup 2 Slides
  • OpenClaw Meetup Slides

2. Agora 的语音交互整合方案

传统语音 AI 流程通常要经过三步：

  1. ASR：语音转文字
  2. LLM：文字理解与生成
  3. TTS：文字转语音

Agora 在分享中展示了更一体化的方案：将大部分接口能力封装在平台层，并在底层调用 OpenClaw 接口。这样可以明显降低开发复杂度，也能提升最终对话体验。

3. 部署安全：默认配置并不安全

现场反复强调的一点是：默认部署配置往往不安全。暴露服务后，自动化 bot 会快速扫描，几分钟内就可能出现严重后果，例如：

  • 数据库被未授权访问
  • 敏感信息泄露
  • 主机被入侵

建议的加固措施包括：

  1. 使用 SSH Key 认证
  2. 严格配置防火墙策略
  3. 及时更新系统与依赖
  4. 启用 Fail2ban 防暴力破解
  5. 使用 Docker 进行服务隔离

参考资料：

  • ClawMacdo 部署安全工具

4. OWASP LLM Top 10 与 Prompt Injection

见面会讨论了 OWASP 的 LLM Top 10 风险：

  1. Prompt Injection（提示词注入）
  2. Sensitive Information Disclosure（敏感信息泄露）
  3. Supply Chain Vulnerabilities（供应链漏洞）
  4. Data and Model Poisoning（数据与模型投毒）
  5. Improper Output Handling（不当输出处理）
  6. Excessive Agency（代理权限过高）
  7. System Prompt Leakage（系统提示词泄露）
  8. Vector and Embedding Weaknesses（向量与嵌入弱点）
  9. Misinformation（错误信息）
  10. Unbounded Consumption（资源无限制消耗）

其中优先级最高的是 Prompt Injection。即便模型被指示“不要泄露敏感信息”，攻击者依然可以通过间接、拆分、递进式提问来套取信息。

要降低这类风险，建议引入 guardrails 工具，对输入输出做策略校验、风险过滤和敏感信息保护。

参考资料：

  • SafeFence OpenClaw Guardrails

总结

这次分享让我更明确一件事：AI 智能体系统的发展，必须把能力建设和安全治理放在同等优先级。

  • OpenClaw 的可定制性和扩展性很强
  • 一体化语音方案能显著提升产品体验
  • 部署加固是刚需，不是可选项
  • Prompt Injection 防御应作为一等工程问题

“安全不是一个功能点，而是持续的工程实践。”

entry.title: My Journey at Mistral AI Hackathon - BeWithMe Project
entry.content:
A Special Journey at Mistral AI Hackathon

Duration: February 28 - March 1, 2026

Last weekend, I joined the Mistral AI Hackathon in Singapore. Although my team did not win a prize, the experience was deeply rewarding, and I was honored to receive positive feedback from members of the Mistral AI technical team.

Project Overview: BeWithMe

Core Idea

BeWithMe is designed for people who need emotional companionship but cannot easily meet someone in person. Typical scenarios include:

  • Family members who live far away
  • Friends who are too busy to keep in touch
  • Loved ones who have passed away

Our goal is to use AI to provide a meaningful way to continue emotional connection.

Key Feature: AI Voice Cloning

The heart of the project is AI voice simulation:

  1. Users upload voice samples from loved ones
  2. The system fine-tunes models through deep learning
  3. The assistant responds using similar tone and speaking style
  4. Users get a virtual, emotionally familiar companion

Technical Architecture

Model Fine-Tuning

  • Google Colab for efficient model tuning with free GPU resources
  • Transfer learning based on open-source models

API Service Integration

  • Hugging Face Spaces for mature APIs such as Whisper
  • Avoiding heavy local inference deployment
  • Flexible orchestration of multiple pre-trained models

Data Persistence and Privacy

  • IPFS for storing conversation audio records
  • Blockchain for recording IPFS addresses and ensuring immutability
  • User-owned storage model with stronger data autonomy
  • Privacy-first control over sensitive content

Current Status

The design has been completed, and implementation is in progress. What I shared here reflects the initial architecture and partial implementation of BeWithMe.

Hackathon Takeaways

Technical Recognition

The Mistral AI technical team acknowledged innovation in:

  • Applying AI to real-world emotional support scenarios
  • Building practical systems with open-source and cloud tools
  • Combining technical feasibility with human-centered design

Network and Community

I connected with many talented developers and researchers in Singapore. The technical exchange and career conversations were highly valuable and may lead to future collaborations.

Broader Perspective

Working with teams from different backgrounds expanded my understanding of how AI can be turned into meaningful, real-world products.

Future Plan

  • Complete core product functions of BeWithMe
  • Improve speech quality and conversation naturalness
  • Strengthen privacy and security mechanisms
  • Explore more applications in emotional care scenarios

Acknowledgments

My sincere thanks to Mistral AI for organizing this excellent event, and to friends in Singapore for their warmth and support. This hackathon was not only a technical challenge, but also a memorable life experience.

I hope BeWithMe can eventually provide real support to people who need companionship.

“Technology should serve humanity, not the other way around.”

Mistral AI 黑客松的特别旅程

时间： 2026年2月28日 - 3月1日

上周末，我参加了在新加坡举办的 Mistral AI 黑客松。虽然最终没有获奖，但这次经历非常充实，也很荣幸获得了 Mistral AI 技术团队的积极评价。

项目介绍：BeWithMe

核心理念

BeWithMe 面向那些需要情感陪伴、但现实中难以经常见面的人群，典型场景包括：

  • 异地生活的家人
  • 因工作繁忙难以保持联系的朋友
  • 已经离世但仍被深深怀念的亲人

我们希望通过 AI 技术，提供一种更有温度的连接方式。

核心功能：AI 语音克隆

项目的关键能力是 AI 语音模拟：

  1. 用户上传亲友语音样本
  2. 系统通过深度学习进行微调
  3. 模型学习后可生成相似语气与表达风格
  4. 形成具有熟悉感的虚拟陪伴体验

技术架构

模型微调

  • 使用 Google Colab，利用免费 GPU 资源加速实验
  • 基于开源模型进行迁移学习

API 服务集成

  • 通过 Hugging Face Spaces 调用成熟能力（如 Whisper）
  • 避免复杂本地推理服务部署
  • 灵活编排多个预训练模型

数据持久化与隐私

  • 使用 IPFS 存储对话音频记录
  • 使用区块链保存 IPFS 地址，保证可追溯和不可篡改
  • 强化用户数据自主权
  • 以隐私保护为核心设计原则

当前进展

目前项目设计已完成，核心功能正在持续实现中。本文内容是 BeWithMe 的阶段性方案与部分落地结果。

黑客松收获

技术认可

Mistral AI 技术团队认可了项目在以下方面的创新性：

  • 将 AI 应用于真实的人文关怀场景
  • 用开源与云端工具实现高效系统组合
  • 在技术可行性与产品温度之间取得平衡

社区与人脉

我在现场结识了许多优秀开发者与研究者，围绕技术实现与职业发展进行了深入交流，这些连接对后续合作非常有价值。

视野拓展

与不同背景团队的互动，让我更清楚地看到 AI 从技术能力走向真实产品的路径。

后续计划

  • 完成 BeWithMe 的核心功能开发
  • 优化语音质量与对话自然度
  • 加强隐私与安全机制
  • 探索更多人文关怀方向的应用落地

致谢

感谢 Mistral AI 提供优质平台，也感谢新加坡朋友们的热情支持。这次黑客松不仅是技术挑战，更是一段非常珍贵的人生经历。

我希望 BeWithMe 最终能真正帮助到需要陪伴的人。

“技术应当服务于人，而不是反过来。”

entry.title: Joining Bybit as a QA Development Engineer
entry.content:
A New Chapter: Joining Bybit Singapore

Date: December 1, 2025
Location: Singapore
Position: QA Development Engineer

Today marks the beginning of an exciting new chapter in my career. I am thrilled to share that I have joined Bybit, one of the world’s leading cryptocurrency exchanges, as a QA Development Engineer in Singapore.

Why Bybit?

Bybit has long been at the forefront of blockchain and cryptocurrency innovation, recognized for both strong products and world-class engineering standards. With Singapore’s vibrant tech ecosystem and Bybit’s commitment to excellence, this role feels like the ideal next step.

As a QA Development Engineer, I will focus on:

  • Designing and developing automated testing frameworks
  • Building robust testing infrastructure for trading systems
  • Ensuring reliability and performance of blockchain applications
  • Collaborating with talented engineers across global teams

Expectations and Goals

This role combines my passion for AI, full-stack engineering, and quality assurance. I am especially looking forward to:

  1. Technical Growth

    • Mastering blockchain testing and QA methodologies
    • Building scalable automation frameworks
    • Gaining deep understanding of exchange systems

  2. Professional Development

    • Learning from experts in Web3 and fintech
    • Contributing to mission-critical systems serving millions of users
    • Expanding my network in the blockchain community

  3. Real-World Impact

    • Improving reliability of financial infrastructure
    • Helping secure user assets and transactions
    • Contributing to the future of decentralized finance

Gratitude and Excitement

I am deeply grateful for this opportunity and excited for what comes next. From my undergraduate thesis on blogging systems to full-stack development, AI research, and now blockchain, this journey has been both challenging and rewarding.

Special thanks to everyone who has supported me along the way, especially my mentors, teammates, and friends in Singapore.

What’s Next?

As I settle into this role, I will continue to:

  • Contribute to open-source projects
  • Share knowledge through blog posts and technical writing
  • Explore the intersection of AI and blockchain
  • Stay active in the tech community

More updates from my Bybit journey will be coming soon.

“Quality is not an act, it is a habit.” - Aristotle

新篇章：加入 Bybit 新加坡

日期： 2025年12月1日
地点： 新加坡
职位： QA 开发工程师

今天是我职业生涯中一个全新阶段的开始。我很高兴地和大家分享：我已经加入全球领先的加密货币交易所之一 Bybit，在新加坡担任 QA 开发工程师。

为什么选择 Bybit？

Bybit 一直处于区块链和加密货币技术创新前沿，以优秀的产品能力和高标准工程实践著称。结合新加坡活跃的技术生态，以及公司对卓越的坚持，这份工作非常契合我下一阶段的发展方向。

作为 QA 开发工程师，我将主要负责：

  • 设计与开发自动化测试框架
  • 为交易系统构建稳定可靠的测试基础设施
  • 保障区块链应用的可靠性与性能
  • 与全球优秀工程师团队紧密协作

期望与目标

这个角色融合了我对 AI、全栈工程和质量保障的长期兴趣。我尤其期待在以下方面持续成长：

  1. 技术成长

    • 掌握区块链测试与 QA 方法论
    • 构建可扩展的自动化测试体系
    • 深入理解交易所核心系统

  2. 职业发展

    • 向 Web3 与金融科技领域专家学习
    • 参与服务海量用户的关键系统建设
    • 拓展在区块链社区的人脉与合作机会

  3. 实际影响

    • 提升金融系统稳定性
    • 保护用户资产与交易安全
    • 为去中心化金融的长期发展贡献力量

感恩与期待

我非常珍惜这次机会，也对未来充满期待。从本科阶段研究博客系统，到全栈开发、AI 研究，再到今天进入区块链行业，这一路的积累让我受益匪浅。

感谢一路支持我的导师、同事和朋友，特别是在新加坡给予我帮助的伙伴们。

接下来

在适应新岗位的同时，我也会继续：

  • 参与开源项目建设
  • 通过博客和技术文章持续分享
  • 探索 AI 与区块链的结合点
  • 持续参与技术社区交流

后续我会继续更新在 Bybit 的工作与学习心得。

“质量不是一种行为，而是一种习惯。” - 亚里士多德
